query: What dental services fall under Class II basic services?
answer:
| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Class II - Basic Services | Therapeutic drug injections administered in a dental office | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Retreatment of a root canal when services are done at least 12 months after the original procedure when performed by a different dental office | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Simple extractions | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Surgical extractions of erupted or impacted teeth and removal of residual tooth roots | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Oral excision of soft tissue or bone | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Oral excision of intra-osseous lesions | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Oral surgical Incision | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Alveoplasty or vestibuloplasty | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Application of desensitizing medicament or resin | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
| Class II - Basic Services | Fillings, consisting of amalgam and composite resins on any given tooth surface | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | No additional limitations. |
